title: The Worst Generation Faces the Emperors
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Unknown person #4, Kaido as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh!? When did he get hit?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He didn't. This is a side effect from becoming that wrecking ball thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'll be unable to use Haki for 10 minutes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So there are drawbacks, to that kind of power, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, it'll be worth it, if those blows did damage!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Done already? You really gave it your all, didn't you?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 21 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
